TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sasasezeman ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 261 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 250 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, saysiyat 18%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sasasezeman hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sasasezeman hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sasasezeman hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sasasezeman hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sasasezeman hya' ga kaehkaba:oS. tay 'zil na Sasasezeman hya' ga haba:. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa kaeħkaβa:os~ɕ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa ħaβa:. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sasasezeman ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 261 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 250 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, saysiyat 18%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sasasezeman hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sasasezeman hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sasasezeman hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sasasezeman hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sasasezeman hya' ga kaehkaba:oS. tay 'zil na Sasasezeman hya' ga haba:. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa kaeħkaβa:os~ɕ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕas~ɕas~ɕezeman ħjaʔ ɣa ħaβa:. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
